text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Seiun Sky and I are dozing on the
train back when I suddenly awaken.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Mm... Morning...

text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text: Next is the last and final stop—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The last stop... Huh? Where are we?

Having fallen asleep and taken the train to the
end of the line, we decide to take a stroll before
catching the return train home.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Walking around an unfamiliar place like this feels
a little like we're on vacation, doesn't it?
choice_data_list: A vacation wasn't in the plan...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't go sweating the details. ♪ Let's just take it
easy till the train comes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa whoa, what's that? Could it be...

Spotting something, Seiun Sky turns her back to
the sea and takes off running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is... I can't believe it! This thing's doing a
bang-up job!

I run to catch up and find her passionately
admiring a massive rock.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at that flat top! It looks sooo comfy. ♪ And
with the soothing sound of the waves too, I bet
you could catch some fine Zs here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The only trouble would be the light reflecting
from the ocean in summer, and then the cold wind
in winter... Yeah, points off for those.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you get two stars! I think you're worth
adding to my "secret nap spots of the country"
map.
choice_data_list: You have a secret nap spot map?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Nothing gets past you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's a compilation of the best places to snooze I've
found while out and about.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, as long as you've got this map, you can find
a great place to zonk right out, wherever you are.
choice_data_list:
So basically it's a collection of places you go
when you skip practice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What a scandalous thing to say... Still, can't say
you're wrong there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, back to business. I gave this guy two stars
for visuals, but now it's time to assess the sleep
situation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think a snooze test's in order. See ya when I
wake up!

We're going to miss the train if she dozes off
here!

We're going to miss the train if she dozes off
here!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, telling me not to sleep is a lot like telling a gourmand not to eat.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All I'm asking for's about two—no, three hours.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that bit slipped my mind. We gotta get
back to the station soonish, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The harmony between the fluffy seat and the
gentle rocking of the carriage... I think someone
once called it "the train line lullaby"...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All aboard the three-star nap spot—the train. ♪

It sounds like Sky plans to fall into a deep
slumber on the train ride back. That's what got us
into this mess in the first place, so I vow to stay
awake.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa... You're gonna test it out for me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's only natural you'd be curious about how
it feels to sleep atop a seaside boulder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Go ahead then, Trainer. You handle this review.

I decide to give Sky a review that will satisfy her.
That way, we can head for the station ASAP.

The sound of the waves is lulling me off to sleep. I
can't afford to nod off here, but it's hard to
resist...
choice_data_list: Oh no... At this rate... I'll actually...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, good morning. I mean, it's already dark out,
so I guess it's good evening.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You looked reeeal comfy. ♪ Yep, my nap spot
radar's as reliable as ever.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
While you were out cold I even went and found
some other spots that looked ripe for napping.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Fancy testing those out too?

Sky still looks eager to explore, but I manage to
persuade her that we should make for the station.
